stemHtml: Over mountainous or high terrain where no minimum flight altitude has been established, IFR flights must be conducted at a level at least…

options.a: 2000 ft above the highest obstacle within 8 km of the aircraft's estimated position.
options.b: 2000 ft above the highest obstacle within 8 NM of the aircraft's estimated position.
options.c: 1000 ft above the highest obstacle within 8 NM of the aircraft's estimated position.
options.d: 1000 ft above the highest obstacle within 8 km of the aircraft's estimated position.
